mapper.select: SELECT m.id AS messageId, m.conversation_id AS conversationId, m.seq_no AS seqNo, m.client_msg_id AS clientMsgId, m.from_user_id AS fromUserId, m.to_user_id AS toUserId, CASE m.msg_type WHEN 1 THEN 'TEXT' WHEN 2 THEN 'EMOJI' WHEN 3 THEN 'IMAGE' WHEN 4 THEN 'VIDEO' WHEN 5 THEN 'FILE' WHEN 6 THEN 'SYSTEM' ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END AS msgType, m.content AS content, m.file_id AS fileId, m.send_status AS sendStatus, m.sent_at AS sentAt FROM im_message m JOIN im_conversation_user cu ON cu.conversation_id = m.conversation_id JOIN im_conversation c ON c.id = m.conversation_id WHERE m.conversation_id = #{conversationId} AND cu.user_id = #{userId} AND cu.deleted = 0 AND c.status = 1 ORDER BY m.seq_no DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}

SELECT m.id AS messageId, m.conversation_id AS conversationId, m.seq_no AS seqNo, m.client_msg_id AS clientMsgId, m.from_user_id AS fromUserId, m.to_user_id AS toUserId, CASE m.msg_type WHEN 1 THEN 'TEXT' WHEN 2 THEN 'EMOJI' WHEN 3 THEN 'IMAGE' WHEN 4 THEN 'VIDEO' WHEN 5 THEN 'FILE' WHEN 6 THEN 'SYSTEM' ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END AS msgType, m.content AS content, m.file_id AS fileId, m.send_status AS sendStatus, m.sent_at AS sentAt FROM im_message m JOIN im_conversation_user cu ON cu.conversation_id = m.conversation_id JOIN im_conversation c ON c.id = m.conversation_id WHERE m.conversation_id = #{conversationId} AND cu.user_id = #{userId} AND cu.deleted = 0 AND c.status = 1 AND m.seq_no < #{maxSeqNo} ORDER BY m.seq_no DESC LIMIT #{pageSize}

SELECT m.id AS messageId, m.conversation_id AS conversationId, m.seq_no AS seqNo, m.client_msg_id AS clientMsgId, m.from_user_id AS fromUserId, m.to_user_id AS toUserId, CASE m.msg_type WHEN 1 THEN 'TEXT' WHEN 2 THEN 'EMOJI' WHEN 3 THEN 'IMAGE' WHEN 4 THEN 'VIDEO' WHEN 5 THEN 'FILE' WHEN 6 THEN 'SYSTEM' ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END AS msgType, m.content AS content, m.file_id AS fileId, m.send_status AS sendStatus, m.sent_at AS sentAt FROM im_message m JOIN im_conversation_user cu ON cu.conversation_id = m.conversation_id JOIN im_conversation c ON c.id = m.conversation_id WHERE m.conversation_id = #{conversationId} AND cu.user_id = #{userId} AND cu.deleted = 0 AND c.status = 1 AND m.seq_no > #{afterSeq} ORDER BY m.seq_no ASC LIMIT #{pageSize}

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM im_message m JOIN im_conversation_user cu ON cu.conversation_id = m.conversation_id JOIN im_conversation c ON c.id = m.conversation_id WHERE m.conversation_id = #{conversationId} AND cu.user_id = #{userId} AND cu.deleted = 0 AND c.status = 1

SELECT id, conversation_id AS conversationId, conversation_type AS conversationType, seq_no AS seqNo, client_msg_id AS clientMsgId, from_user_id AS fromUserId, to_user_id AS toUserId, group_id AS groupId, msg_type AS msgType, content, extra_json AS extraJson, file_id AS fileId, send_status AS sendStatus, sent_at AS sentAt, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM im_message WHERE from_user_id = #{fromUserId} AND client_msg_id = #{clientMsgId} LIMIT 1
